description_long: This rifle features a compact, utilitarian design with a predominantly matte reddish-brown finish and black accents. The stock is a skeletonized, wireframe style, providing a lightweight yet sturdy rear support. The receiver and handguard are perforated with ventilation holes, likely for heat dissipation, and the magazine is a detachable box type, positioned just ahead of the trigger guard. The barrel is relatively short and straight, with no visible muzzle device attached. Iron sights are mounted on the top rail, and the overall construction suggests a blend of metal and polymer materials, typical for modern urban firearms.
description: A compact, reddish-brown rifle with a skeletonized stock, perforated handguard, detachable box magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, skeletonized stock, perforated handguard, and magazine placement.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel end, iron sights, and the narrow profile of the handguard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the stock and handguard details, with the magazine and trigger visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the open, wireframe stock and the alignment of the iron sights.
